title: Criteria2Query: a natural language interface to clinical databases for cohort definition.
author: Yuan C Ryan PB Ta C Guo Y Li Z Hardin J Makadia R Jin P Shang N Kang T Weng C
content:
S-EPMC6402359 PMC6402359 Criteria2Query: a natural language interface to clinical databases for cohort definition.

Objective

Cohort definition is a bottleneck for conducting clinical research and depends on subjective decisions by domain experts. Data-driven cohort definition is appealing
